text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet finishes her debut and makes it into
a special feature article alongside Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Less than pleased at being listed second among
the "Future Queens of Racing"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to claim the number one spot with
aplomb in her first Classic race.
